name: BMM_SIGNATURE
documentation: Built-in meta-type that expresses the type structure of any referenceable element of a model. Consists of potential `_arguments_` and `_result_`, with constraints in descendants determining the exact form.

flattened_type_list.name: flattened_type_list
flattened_type_list.documentation: Return the logical set (i.e. unique items) consisting of `_argument_types.flattened_type_list_()` and `_result_type.flattened_type_list_()`.
